parameters.comparison: K_pre (no RoPE) vs K_post (with RoPE) vs V

prediction_outcome: RoPE artifact REJECTED (0/4 artifact predictions confirmed, 3/4 intrinsic confirmed)
key_finding: RoPE HURTS K probing at 8/8 layers (mean -0.159 Pearson R). K_pre (no RoPE) > K_post (with RoPE) everywhere. K_pre ≈ V overall (diff -0.011), K_pre > V at ramp (+0.024). Exp_091's K>V finding is NOT a RoPE artifact — it's conservative. Methodology bug in |nums metric (R² vs Pearson R) limits residualized analysis but relative findings are robust.
evidence_impact: DECISIVELY REJECTS confound #1 from exp_091 self-review. K>V probing hierarchy is intrinsic to learned projections, not positional encoding. Exp_091's K>V is a LOWER BOUND on true K content advantage.
next_planned: Fix probe methodology (Pearson R + CV residualization) and re-run RoPE ablation, or cross-model K layer sweep on Phi-3.5-mini, or bootstrap significance test for K-V gap.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles (6 independent). K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates. K>V confirmed in PROBING (32/36 layers). RoPE ablation: NOT an artifact (Exp 092).

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep on 2 families + 2 sizes. Layer sweep: ramp/plateau for BOTH K and V (exp 089, 091). K>V in probing. RoPE ablation confirms NOT artifact (exp 092). Per-operation probing on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep STRONG on 2 families + 2 sizes, WEAK on Mistral. K+V layer sweep on Qwen only.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 10 scans, 110+ papers, 18+ convergent angles. K=routing/V=content 6 angles. Forward-looking features theoretically explained.
